-class UNet(nn.Module):

+

+class ConvBlock(nn.Module):

+    """Double convolution block for UNet."""

+    def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, dropout=0.0):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.conv1 = nn.Conv1d(in_channels, out_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False)

+        self.bn1 = nn.BatchNorm1d(out_channels)

+        self.conv2 = nn.Conv1d(out_channels, out_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=False)

+        self.bn2 = nn.BatchNorm1d(out_channels)

+        self.relu = nn.ReLU(inplace=True)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout)

+        if in_channels != out_channels:

+            self.skip = nn.Conv1d(in_channels, out_channels, 1, bias=False)

+        else:

+            self.skip = nn.Identity()

+

+    def forward(self, x):

+        residual = self.skip(x)

+        out = self.relu(self.bn1(self.conv1(x)))

+        out = self.dropout(out)

+        out = self.bn2(self.conv2(out))

+        out = self.relu(out + residual)

+        return out

+

+

+class ClimateUNet(nn.Module):

+    """1D U-Net with scalar conditioning broadcasted as additional channels."""

     def __init__(self, init_channels=64, num_down_blocks=2, dropout=0.2, scalar_embedding=8):

         super().__init__()

+        self.num_down = num_down_blocks

         self.scalar_embedding = scalar_embedding

-        self.scalar_project = nn.Linear(4, scalar_embedding)

-

+        self.enc_channels = ch

+

+        # Initial conv to init_channels

+        self.initial = ConvBlock(input_channels, init_channels, dropout)

+

+        # Encoder blocks and pools

         self.down_blocks = nn.ModuleList()

-            )

-            self.down_outs.append(out_channels)

-

-        ch = bottleneck_channels

+            self.pools.append(nn.MaxPool1d(2, stride=2))

+            self.down_blocks.append(ConvBlock(ch[i], ch[i+1], dropout))

 

         # Decoder

     def forward(self, x):

+        # Embed scalars into per-level features

+

+        # Concatenate input features

+        inp = torch.cat([profiles, scalar_feat], dim=1)  # (B, 2+E, 60)

+

+        # Initial conv

+        out = self.initial(inp)  # (B, C0, 60)

+        skips = [out]

 

         # Encoder

-        skips = []

             skips.append(out)

+            out = self.up_blocks[self.num_down - 1 - i](out)  # up_blocks stored in reverse order

+        # out shape: (B, C0, 60)
